text_en: Can't see, auto-fails sight checks; attacks against have advantage, its attacks have disadvantage.
Can't attack the charmer; charmer has advantage on social checks against it.
Can't hear and auto-fails hearing checks.
Disadvantage on checks and attacks while source is in sight; can't willingly move closer.
Speed becomes 0; ends if the grappler is incapacitated.
Heavily obscured; attacks against have disadvantage, its attacks have advantage.
Incapacitated and can't move or speak; auto-fails Str/Dex saves; hits within 5 ft are crits.
Transformed to stone, incapacitated, resistant to all damage.
Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.
Disadvantage on attacks; melee attacks against have advantage, ranged have disadvantage.
Speed 0; attacks against have advantage, its attacks disadvantage; disadvantage on Dex saves.
Incapacitated, can't move, auto-fails Str/Dex saves; attacks against have advantage.
Incapacitated, drops everything, prone; auto-fails Str/Dex saves; hits within 5 ft are crits.
Cumulative levels of fatigue with escalating penalties; level 6 is death.
